title: polypodium tonellii
intro: Polypodium tonellii, also known as Polypodium leucotomos, is a species of fern native to Central and South America, commonly used in traditional medicine. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its extract, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polypodium tonellii include protecting the skin from sun damage, reducing inflammation, and potentially reducing the risk of certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the extract is often used in topical creams and supplements, as well as in some pharmaceutical applications, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
